text:
Once upon a time, in a small town filled with colorful houses and lively streets, there lived a boy named Tim. Tim loved to explore, to discover secrets, and to build his own cardboard castles among the trees. His favorite weekend adventures took him to the old oak tree at the edge of town, where legends said a hidden door might appear.

One particular weekend, driven by excitement, Tim spent hours piecing together a makeshift catapult and spent the day dreaming of heroes. His adventures were always filled with bravery, friendship, and occasionally, a dash of mischief.

As night fell, an ethereal glow began to flicker near the tree, and sure enough, the door emerged silently. Tim stepped inside, the door sealing behind him with a faint whoosh. He felt as though he'd walked through the pages of a fantastical novel.

With a sense of wonder, Tim stepped forward and pulled the iron handle on a quaint little lantern. The glow illuminated a small living room filled with golden
